vibe: High-end Silicon Valley startup, sophisticated, premium, trustworthy

rules: Use font-light or font-black for extreme contrast, avoiding standard bold
Overlines must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 inside containers.

grids.marketing: Asymmetrical Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) - mix 3+ shapes, wide gaps (gap-8).
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid - dense, tight gaps (gap-6), every pixel utilized.

cards.style: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#34d399] text-[#022c22] font-semibold rounded-xl hover:bg-[#6ee7b7] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-white/5

hero.overlay: bg-black/40 to bg-black/60 gradient for readability
hero.search_bar: Centered glassmorphism panel, thick padding (p-4), separated inputs, primary CTA attached.

map.style: Dark mode tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter). Glowing pins for spots.

images.description: Modern house with driveway (aerial/wide feel), perfect for hero background. Use with heavy dark overlay.
Aerial view of a parking lot to use in spot detail views or fallback images.
High-end driveway for premium spot listing.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply Dark Theme with Deep Emerald base (#022c22, #064e3b). Do not use pure black except for the absolute lowest layers or overlays.
Do NOT use generic feature boxes. Use a Bento/Tetris asymmetrical grid for the landing page.
Use Phosphor Icons (thin/light weight) exclusively. Run yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Ensure all components have exactly 12px (rounded-xl) border radius.
Apply subtle, deep drop shadows (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)), NEVER flat brutalist shadows.
Integrate Leaflet map using a Dark Mode tile layer. Map should take up significant screen real estate on the dashboard.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
Use Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10) for the centered search overlay on the hero section.
Do not use Inter for Headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Inter for body text.
